parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly claims to be a Werewolf in line 123 ('I was a werewolf, so there's a werewolf in here'). While Paul claims to be the Tanner, voting for the Tanner would result in a loss for Team Village. Since Justin admitted to being a Werewolf, eliminating him is the most likely way for Team Village to achieve their win condition.
